title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at New India Assurance

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at New India Assurance
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with New India Assurance! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About New India Assurance:
New India Assurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance!
